What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

All Pricing is on a sliding scale based on family income, After registration your child will be placed on a team, assigned a coach, Full (Kits) Uniforms are provided to all recreational players, Shoot us a call, an email, or a letter

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Family + athlete record Registration + volunteer view Season calendar + registration windows Season closeout + re-enrollment Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Registration, sliding-scale review, and team placement in one athlete record
  • Umbro kit size captured at registration — no separate spreadsheet for the coach
  • Fall + Spring season calendar and practice schedule on one timeline families can read

1. Season ops snapshot

Season ops snapshot

Open registrations, sliding-scale reviews, kit sizes still missing, and teams still to finalize - the four numbers Russ and Mackenzie currently rebuild from admin@ email.

2. Registration + roster board

Registration + roster board

Each family moves Inquiry -> Registered (TeamSnap) -> Sliding-scale review -> Team + coach assigned -> Umbro kit ordered, so nothing stalls between TeamSnap and the coach group text.

Open this view

3. Family + athlete record

Family + athlete record

One record per athlete with TeamSnap status, sliding-scale tier, Umbro kit size, team placement with friend requests, and the primary family contact.

Open this view

4. Registration + volunteer view

Registration + volunteer view

Checklist for the five things every family has to finish before a child is cleared for weekly training - including the volunteer-role pick that the /volunteer page asks for separately today.

Open this view

5. Season calendar + registration windows

Season calendar + registration windows

Early Bird window, Standard window, sliding-scale review, team assignment, and the Fall + Spring season weekends at Plantes Ferry on one timeline families can read at a glance.

6. Season closeout + re-enrollment

Season closeout + re-enrollment

Family survey, priority Fall re-enrollment tagging, coach recognition, and sliding-scale archive - the closeout work 90+ repeats every season.

TeamSnap, sliding-scale review, team placement, Umbro kit, volunteer coach roster, season calendar, and the admin@ comms log - where each one lives and how the workspace wires them together.
